allow: Bash(php -r 'require '\\''vendor/autoload.php'\\''; $d=Dotenv\\Dotenv::createImmutable\('\\''.'\\''\); $d->load\(\); $p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host='\\''.$_ENV['\\''DB_HOST'\\''].'\\'';dbname='\\''.$_ENV['\\''DB_NAME'\\''], $_ENV['\\''DB_USER'\\''], $_ENV['\\''DB_PASS'\\'']\); $s=$p->prepare\('\\''SELECT TRIM\(c.documento\) n, TRIM\(g.nombrecli\) cl, DATE_FORMAT\(c.fechent,"%d/%m/%Y"\) f FROM cabezamov c INNER JOIN geclientes g ON TRIM\(g.codcli\)=TRIM\(c.codcp\) WHERE c.tm=:t AND c.estado IN\("C","M"\) AND TRIM\(g.codtipocli\)=:ct GROUP BY c.documento,c.prefijo,c.fechent,c.estado,g.nombrecli ORDER BY c.fechent'\\''\); $s->execute\(['\\'':t'\\''=>'\\''PV'\\'','\\'':ct'\\''=>'\\''01'\\'']\); foreach\($s->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\) as $r\) echo $r['\\''n'\\''].'\\'' '\\''.$r['\\''cl'\\''].'\\'' '\\''.$r['\\''f'\\''].PHP_EOL;')
